grp_lisraya_content_pattern_rules_01.intent: Maintain layout accessibility and clean readability through an ordered, non-ambiguous visual type scale.

Secondary supporting copy may be 14px (type_scale.secondary_body), and footnote/reference copy must be 12px (type_scale.footnote) and visually distinct. Running body copy must never fall below the absolute minimum of 12px. Distinct, adjacent text blocks must not share identical sizing and weights if they perform different roles in the visual hierarchy.
